scene.message: Female Student: Eee, look,{nl} look~ This dress is so cute~{color:3}♥{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Hey~ this is so cool~{color:3}♥{color:0}{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Aw~ have I put on{nl} weight lately~{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: The pricier the item,{nl} the sturdier it looks.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Armor, perhaps?{waitkey}It's a bit more reassuring{nl} than wearing no armor at all.{waitkey}{ret}
